post.summary: Send a single-turn prompt to Claude, optionally with attached files

context.description: Optional context to provide alongside the prompt

files.description: Optional list of Nextcloud file paths to include as context

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Claude response with model info and token usage

404.description: One of the attached files was not found

413.description: Prompt or context exceeds the 5 MB content limit

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests per minute)

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Send a multi-turn conversation to Claude

options.description: Optional model parameters (temperature, top_p, top_k, stop_sequences)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Claude response with model info and token usage

400.description: Messages array is missing or empty

413.description: Combined message content exceeds the 5 MB content limit

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests per minute)

401.description: Current user is not logged in

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Claude summary with model info and token usage

413.description: Content exceeds the 5 MB content limit

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests per minute)

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Analyze a Nextcloud file with Claude (vision for images, document for PDFs, text for others)

filePath.description: Path to the file within the user's Nextcloud storage

prompt.description: Instruction or question about the file

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Claude analysis with model info and token usage

400.description: No filePath provided or prompt is invalid

404.description: File not found at the given path

413.description: Prompt exceeds the 5 MB content limit

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests per minute)

401.description: Current user is not logged in

api_key.description: Personal API key for the scoped provider (leave empty to clear)

model.description: Preferred model ID for the scoped provider (leave empty to use admin default)

provider.description: Active provider override ('' clears, e.g. 'anthropic'/'mistral', null keeps unchanged). Also scopes api_key/model in this call.

default_system_prompt.description: Default system prompt (null to keep unchanged)

default_verbose.description: Enable verbose mode by default ('1' or null to keep unchanged)

native_mcp_enabled.description: User override for native-MCP ('1' opt in, '0' opt out, '' clears override, null keeps unchanged)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

get.summary: Get the content of a file (base64-encoded for binary files)

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file within the user's Nextcloud storage

200.description: File content with encoding and MIME type

400.description: No path provided or path refers to a directory

404.description: File not found at the given path

get.summary: Get a base64-encoded preview image for a file

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file within the user's Nextcloud storage

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Preview width in pixels (16-1024, default: 256)

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Preview height in pixels (16-1024, default: 256)

200.description: Base64-encoded preview image with MIME type

400.description: No path provided or preview cannot be generated

404.description: File not found at the given path

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.description:
Model, max_tokens, and api_timeout are now managed by Declarative Settings.
This endpoint requires admin access

api_key.description: API key for the instance, scoped to $provider (default 'anthropic')

provider.description: Instance default provider ('anthropic'/'mistral', null keeps unchanged). Also scopes api_key in this call.

native_mcp_enabled.description: Instance default for native-MCP ('1' enabled, '0' disabled, null keeps unchanged)

native_mcp_extra_url.description: Optional extra MCP server URL (trimmed; null keeps unchanged)

native_mcp_extra_token.description: Bearer token for the extra MCP server ('' clears, null keeps unchanged)

mistral_connector_ids.description: Comma/space-separated Mistral connector IDs for the native-MCP path (trimmed; null keeps unchanged)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

403.description: Logged in account must be an admin

post.summary: Test the current configuration by sending a live request to Claude
post.description:
Uses saved model/max_tokens/api_timeout from Declarative Settings. Optionally accepts an API key override for testing before saving.
This endpoint requires admin access

api_key.description: API key to test (uses saved key if empty)

provider.description: Provider to test ('anthropic'/'mistral'; null uses the active provider). Also scopes the api_key override.

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Test request completed; see success field for result

400.description: No API key available or the test request failed

401.description: Current user is not logged in

403.description: Logged in account must be an admin

tags.name: page
tags.description: Page Controller for AIquila main interface

tags.name: coworker
tags.description: REST API for cowork tasks — persistent scheduled AI jobs. Consumed by the Cowork UI and by the MCP server (Basic Auth), hence NoCSRFRequired alongside NoAdminRequired.
